name: python_web_taint_and_deserialization

files.app.py:
import os
import pickle
import subprocess
import yaml


def route(request, cursor):
    command = request.args.get('cmd')
    code = request.args.get('code')
    subprocess.run(command, shell=True)
    eval(code)
    cursor.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{code}'")
    yaml.load(request.data)
    pickle.loads(request.data)
